ModuleName: Data Manipulation and Cleaning with NumPy and Pandas

Artifacts.Name: Module Topics
Artifacts.Description: A structured list of all topics covered in the module — including NumPy arrays, Pandas DataFrames, indexing, merging, and data cleaning — used by learners and instructors to understand the scope and sequence of the module's content.

Artifacts.Name: Module Topics (HTML)
Artifacts.Description: A topic outline for the 'Data Manipulation and Cleaning with NumPy and Pandas' module that lists and briefly describes each subject area covered, such as NumPy arrays and vectorized operations, giving learners and instructors an at-a-glance overview of what the module addresses.

Artifacts.Name: Data_Manipulation_and_generated.pptx
Artifacts.Description: A slide deck walking learners through key concepts in NumPy and Pandas, covering ndarray fundamentals, DataFrame operations, indexing methods, merging, and data cleaning techniques, used as the primary instructional presentation for the module.

Artifacts.Name: Introduction to NumPy for Data Manipulation
Artifacts.Description: A reading that introduces NumPy arrays, explaining their performance advantages over plain Python lists and covering core concepts of numerical computing in Python, intended for learners to study before working with array-based data manipulation.

Artifacts.Name: Getting Started with Pandas DataFrames
Artifacts.Description: A reading that introduces the Pandas library, its key data structures (Series and DataFrame), and how they build on NumPy to support structured data analysis, giving learners the foundation needed before performing data operations.

Artifacts.Name: Indexing and Selecting Data
Artifacts.Description: A reading that explains how to access and subset data in Pandas DataFrames and Series using label-based, position-based, and conditional indexing techniques, serving as a reference learners apply when selecting specific rows, columns, or cells during analysis.

Artifacts.Name: Merging, Joining, and Concatenating Data
Artifacts.Description: A reading that covers how to combine multiple DataFrames using Pandas merge, join, and concatenation operations, explaining different join types and use cases so learners can integrate data arriving from separate sources.

Artifacts.Name: Reshaping and Transforming Data
Artifacts.Description: A reading that explains how to reshape and restructure DataFrames using techniques such as pivoting, melting, and stacking, helping learners reformat datasets into the layout required for a given analysis or pipeline.

Artifacts.Name: Handling Missing Data
Artifacts.Description: A reading that covers how to detect, remove, and impute missing values in Pandas, explaining the causes of missing data and the tools available so learners can make informed decisions about handling gaps in real datasets.

Artifacts.Name: Cleaning and Transforming Real-World Datasets
Artifacts.Description: A reading that walks through end-to-end data cleaning workflows on realistic messy datasets, addressing issues such as duplicates, inconsistent formats, outliers, and mixed-type fields, giving learners a practical guide to preparing raw data for analysis.

Artifacts.Name: Quiz Question Bank (35 questions)
Artifacts.Description: A 35-question bank covering NumPy and Pandas fundamentals—including NumPy's naming, core data structures, vectorized operations, boolean indexing, and array reshaping—used by instructors to build quizzes or assessments that test learners' data manipulation and cleaning skills.
